description: This Java class configures notification services and providers within a Spring Boot application. It sets up beans for different email and SMS providers based on application properties, and wires a NotificationService with the configured providers, supporting different third-party integrations with fallback to stub implementations.

classes.name: NotificationConfig
classes.description: Spring configuration class for setting up notification providers and notification service beans. It determines the provider implementations based on application properties and initializes the main NotificationService.

methods.name: emailProvider
methods.description: Creates and returns an EmailProvider bean based on the configured email provider, supporting stub, SendGrid, and Mailjet implementations.

methods.name: smsProvider
methods.description: Creates and returns an SmsProvider bean based on the configured SMS provider, supporting stub and Twilio implementations.

methods.name: notificationService
methods.description: Creates a NotificationService bean utilizing configured EmailProvider and SmsProvider instances.
